title: Accurate Wither Storm Mod
description: Aims to make Cracker's Wither Storm Mod more accurate to Story Mode.
body:
This pack aims to make Cracker's Wither Storm Mod more accurate to Minecraft: Story Mode. The pack changes:

- **The Command Block tools and the Amulet.** All these items have been heavily modified to make them look exactly the ones from Story Mode.
- **The textures of the tainted blocks.** Tainted blocks now look like their older variants, accurate to MC:SM.
- **The textures of the Wither Storm and the Command Block.** With some editing, the Wither Storm, and the Command Block are more accurate to Story Mode.

Credits to:

- LucasDotje for using some of its pack's textures.
  

_**Cracker's Wither Storm Mod is required for this pack to work.**_

It is compatible with the "MC Story Mode Remastered" modpack.

For any questions, fell free to ask me at francescotriggiani12@gmail.com.
